run_summary.summary: 1 new deal, 2 updates. Touchstone Home is a 'FIRM OFFER' from Picking Daisies Media (Apr 26) — compensation TBD (paid or gifted), deadline likely tight. Smart Solar content was submitted Friday Apr 24 — moving to Approval. Big urgent: Flexsteel's PopFly campaign application deadline is TODAY (Mon Apr 27) — Ian extended it from Friday after Kenny forgot to apply following the Steinhafels content shoot on Apr 23. Sherwin Williams response from Reach Agency expected today as well.

suggestions.message: TODAY is the last day for the Flexsteel PopFly campaign application! Ian Saunders (ian@popfly.com) extended it from Friday to Monday after Kenny forgot to apply post-Steinhafels shoot. If the application isn't in yet, do it now before the window closes.
Reach Agency (Coreyiel) was pitching Liz's profile to the brand client by EOD today (Mon Apr 27). If no response by tomorrow afternoon, a quick nudge: 'Just checking in — any update from the brand?'

JLab March payment was overdue as of Apr 24 (due 4/20). Platform flagged that the brand had the wrong email on file but it was being corrected. Worth confirming the registration form + payment arrived this week.

deals.next_action: Decide if interested — if yes: (1) sign up for Awin affiliate program, (2) fill out questionnaire and send to Mariah at Picking Daisies
deals.notes: [Apr 26]: Firm offer via Picking Daisies Media (Liz's PR firm). Touchstone Home building ambassador/affiliate program. Compensation not automatically gratis — email says timing, credentials, and specific product all impact whether paid or gifted. They make electric fireplaces and home entertainment stands (high product value). Roster-wide offer. To apply: (1) join Awin affiliate program at touchstonehomeproducts.com/pages/join-the-touchstone-home-products-affiliate-program, (2) fill out attached questionnaire 'Touchstone Home Products SOCIAL INFLUENCER Questions - 2026.docx' and submit to manager. Deadlines noted as tight.

deals.next_action: Follow up with Social Media Collabs platform on content approval status
deals.notes: [Apr 24]: Content (Linkind SP6 Smart Solar Pathway Lights reel) and caption both uploaded to brand review folder via Social Media Collabs platform. Liz was editing same day the brief was received and confirmed upload by Friday afternoon.
deals.activity_note: Apr 24: Smart Solar content + caption submitted via Social Media Collabs platform — moved to Approval

deals.next_action: URGENT: Confirm Flexsteel PopFly campaign application submitted — Ian extended deadline to today (Apr 27)
deals.notes: [Apr 24]: Ian Saunders at PopFly (ian@popfly.com) extended the Flexsteel campaign application deadline to Monday Apr 27. Kenny and Liz were at Steinhafels showroom on Apr 23 shooting Flexsteel content. Kenny inadvertently missed the application window that evening — Ian agreed to re-open it through Monday. Application must be submitted by EOD today.
deals.activity_note: Apr 23–24: Content shot at Steinhafels; PopFly application window missed Fri, extended to Mon Apr 27 by Ian
